extra.reason: Implemented first vertical TDD slice: /household/dashboard auth route without Team segment; targeted Pest tests pass.
Removed Team shared Inertia props and Team UI route references; household dashboard tests and frontend static/build checks pass.
Disabled public registration and added app:create-first-user command. Registration/auth/dashboard targeted Pest tests and frontend static/build checks pass.
Created core finance schema, ULID models/factories, and idempotent Unassigned Funds bucket seeder. Finance schema and targeted auth/dashboard tests pass.
Created sibling Earmark-parser FastAPI service skeleton, parse contract objects, security helper, README, pyproject, and pytest contract coverage. Laravel remains Python-free.

Built initial account/category/bucket CRUD slice with FormRequests, services, routes, minimal pages, bucket obligation version creation, and archive protections. Targeted Pest/static/build checks pass.

Built manual transaction creation/listing route slice with category and bucket attribution, income defaulting to Unassigned Funds, FormRequest, service, page, Wayfinder generation, and passing targeted tests/static/build checks.
Built transaction split endpoint, FormRequest sum validation, split service, and effective transaction line service. Targeted split/transaction tests plus frontend static/build checks pass.

Added root Docker Compose and Dockerfiles for Earmark-web plus sibling Earmark-parser. docker compose config/build/up succeeded, app responds on :8000, parser docs responds on :8001, tmpfs configured.

Teams scaffolding fully removed: 27 files/dirs deleted (middleware, models, concerns, enums, data, rules, policy, action, notification, response trait, 8 team views, 2 migrations, 2 factories, Teams test directory). Survivor edits: User model lost HasTeams trait + current_team_id, bootstrap/app.php dropped SetTeamUrlDefaults, FortifyServiceProvider dropped teamInvitation context, CreateNewUser dropped CreateTeam dependency, all 5 Fortify Response classes simplified to Fortify::redirects() (config home updated /dashboard → /household/dashboard), routes restructured to /household/dashboard preserving 'dashboard' route name, dashboard/sidebar/header/desktop-user-menu/login/register/settings layout stripped of team UI, UserFactory dropped auto-team afterCreating hook, 3 surviving test files updated. Final: 0 team references remain across app/routes/database/resources/views/tests; 34 tests pass with 82 assertions; pint clean.

Recovered Earmark-fb0's deletions by copying Earmark-web backend (17 files: Models Household/HouseholdInvitation/HouseholdMembership, Concerns HasHousehold/GeneratesUniqueHouseholdSlugs, Enums HouseholdRole/HouseholdPermission, Policy HouseholdPolicy, Rules HouseholdName/UniqueHouseholdInvitation, Notification/Action/Data classes, migration, 2 factories) under new Household-named paths, then bulk-renamed Team→Household via Perl word-boundary regex. Hand-edits for single-household constraint: dropped is_personal column/property/states, dropped multi-team trait methods (currentHousehold/personalHousehold/switchHousehold/isCurrentHousehold/toUserHouseholds/toUserHousehold/fallbackHousehold), dropped slug-based route key (Household model), dropped UserHousehold Data class entirely (no longer needed), added singular household() helper to HasHousehold trait, fixed App\\Support→App\\Data namespace on Data classes. User model gets HasHousehold trait. CreateNewUser injects CreateHousehold action and bootstraps household on register. UserFactory afterCreating creates a household for every test user. HouseholdPolicy.delete() drops is_personal check. Final: 0 team references in app/routes/database/resources/views/tests/config; /household/dashboard route works; 3 household tables (households/household_members/household_invitations) migrate cleanly; 34 tests pass; pint clean.
